历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (including former Science) minimum rankings: 2021 approx. 10919, 2022 approx. 63022 (severe gap that year), 2023 approx. 26587, 2024 approx. 22336, 2025 approx. 24764 (taking first-choice Physics, second-choice unrestricted group). Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the rankings in the past three years fluctuated between 22336 and 26587, with a 2025 baseline of approx. 24764, slightly lower than 2024; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province: 2021–2022 both 16, 2023 15, 2024 11, 2025 10 (continuously shrinking); the 2026 plan significantly expands to 20, a 100% increase from 2025, a huge expansion that will notably lower the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approx. 81st, with rankings steadily rising in recent years and overall strength improving; in 2022, there was a somewhat negative reputation due to a teacher ethics incident, which has since subsided; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity total ranking 49th (relatively hot), overall attention moderately high; no record of enrollment gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), but Physics Category candidates' willingness to apply to language universities is usually weaker than that of History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors are generally lukewarm; Data Science and Big Data Technology (a Physics Category enrollment major) falls under the computer/big data direction, with high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province Gaokao is approx. 1.2 million, with an estimated Physics Category of about 734,000 based on historical proportions, significantly increasing the candidate pool and intensifying competition; 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 24764, the 2026 enrollment plan's significant expansion (+100%), the notable increase in Henan Province candidate numbers, the university's rising ranking, and Physics Category candidates' general lack of interest in language universities: the expansion's effect of easing competition is significant; considering the university's rising ranking and the high popularity of Data Science and Big Data Technology, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approx. 39722, with a range of 39222–40222.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 81st in 2026, with rankings continuously rising in recent years (2021: 93rd → 2025: 82nd → 2026: 81st), showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), a core advantage of the university, strongly attracting language-oriented candidates; in 2022, there was a somewhat negative reputation due to a teacher ethics incident, but it has subsided in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy, limited impact); Douyin popularity overall ranking 49th (relatively hot), in 2022 it ranked 7th (very hot), in 2023 dropped to 64th (average), overall attention is moderately high; no records of enrollment gaps.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2158, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+90%), the notable increase in Henan Province candidate numbers, the university's continuously rising ranking, and the stable popularity of foreign language majors: the competition-relieving effect of expansion outweighs the competition-intensifying effect of increased candidates; after moderate correction considering the rising ranking and A+ discipline appeal, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3373, with a range of 2873–3873.
